## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest` / `npm test`)
- [ ] dbt tests pass (`dbt test`) — required for any pipeline or model changes
- [ ] Data changes include a citation in the PR description or commit message
- [ ] No raw third-party data files committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes)
